data.title: GREEN: Create ui-designer dispatch protocol sub-file
data.description:
## Testing Mode
testing_mode: GREEN
TDD exemption: criterion 3 (Markdown instruction file, no executable behavior surface). Deterministic interface verified by check-shim-refs.sh.

## Description
Create orchestration protocol read inline by preplanning Step 6. Sections:
1. Input Payload Construction: story ID, epic context (from PREPLANNING_CONTEXT), sibling designs from session file, session file path
2. Agent Dispatch: dispatch dso:ui-designer via Agent tool (NOT Skill tool)
3. CACHE_MISSING Retry Loop: on CACHE_MISSING, run /dso:ui-discover at orchestrator level; update session file; re-dispatch; max 2 CACHE_MISSING retries; on 3rd: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED or escalate
4. Review Loop: on REVIEW_DECISION, run review-protocol inline; on APPROVE: tag design:approved; on REVISE: feedback + re-dispatch; max 3 REVISE cycles; on cycle 4: INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED or escalate
5. Scope-Split Handling: preplanning precedence rule for scope-split proposals
6. Session File Updates: update processedStories and siblingDesigns after APPROVE

## File Impact
| File | Action |
|------|--------|
| plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md | create |

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Protocol file passes shim compliance check
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/check-shim-refs.sh plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/prompts/ui-designer-dispatch-protocol.md

## Dependencies
Task 1 (4f41-492c), Task 2 (505b-b294)
